allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const path = require\('path'\); const localStoragePath = path.join\(process.env.LOCALAPPDATA || process.env.HOME, 'AppData', 'Local', 'Microsoft', 'Edge', 'User Data', 'Default', 'Local Storage', 'leveldb'\); console.log\('Checking localStorage path...'\); if \(fs.existsSync\(localStoragePath\)\) { console.log\('Path exists'\); } else { console.log\('Path not found'\); }")
